steps.title: Use the survey proportion
steps.content: The sample estimate is $25\%$, or $0.25$, of the French club students.

steps.title: Apply it to all 60 students
steps.content: Estimate the total number by multiplying: $$0.25\cdot60=15$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer is $15$, so A is correct.

steps.title: Check the estimate size
steps.content: Since $25%$ is one-fourth, the estimate should be one-fourth of $60$. One-fourth of $60$ is $15$, so the total should be much less than $60$ but greater than $0$.
